Author: Team Wrath, Eevi
Name: Wrath Combo - Positional Forecast Test
Description: Testing fork of Wrath Combo that publishes upcoming positional forecasts for Avarice.
Punchline: Wrath Combo with positional forecast IPC for Avarice testing.
Changelog: Adds versioned positional forecast IPC and 1-3 GCD lookahead for melee jobs.

Author: kawaii, NightmareXIV, Wah, Eevi
Name: Avarice - Wrath Forecast Test
Description: Testing fork of Avarice that consumes Wrath Combo positional forecasts.
Punchline: Avarice with predictive Wrath Combo positional integration.
Changelog: Adds Wrath Combo forecast IPC integration, target validation, expiry, and diagnostics.
